title: Odyssey, Book 16: Father and Son
description: Book 16 of Homer's Odyssey: Father and Son.
introduction: Book 16 of the Odyssey: Father and Son. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Τὼ δ᾿ αὖτ᾿ ἐν κλισίῃ Ὀδυσεὺς καὶ δῖος ὑφορβός.
translation.text: Telemachus arrived at the swineherd's hut. Odysseus revealed himself to his son. They wept and embraced. Together they planned the destruction of the suitors: Odysseus would enter the palace disguised as a beggar, and Telemachus would remove the weapons from the hall.
